## what does this PR do?

A short description of the change.

## type of change

- [ ] new tool
- [ ] bug fix
- [ ] improvement to existing tool
- [ ] docs / readme
- [ ] design / styling

## checklist

- [ ] works in light mode and dark mode
- [ ] works on mobile (375px)
- [ ] added to nav in `app/layout.tsx`
- [ ] added to `components/ToolGrid.tsx`
- [ ] added to `components/FeaturedTools.tsx`
- [ ] no hardcoded colors — only CSS variables
- [ ] no external API calls
- [ ] TypeScript has no errors
- [ ] follows the existing aesthetic

## screenshots

If this is a visual change, please include before/after screenshots.
